label: WhatsApp Web — Messenger Browser
description: React app with QR login, chat list sidebar (LHS), message pane (RHS), emoji/attachment panels. Works only with phone app connected. No persistent password login.
source_patterns: QR scan login: phone camera scans web QR code — no manual credential entry
Chat list click: click conversation → 500-1500ms for message pane to load
Message scroll (upward pagination): scroll to top of message pane → older messages lazy-load
Composer input: focus contenteditable div, type message, press Enter to send
Media attach: click clip/plus → file picker → select → wait for upload → send
Emoji reaction: hover message → click emoji icon → select from picker
Voice message: hold mic icon → record → release to send
Group info / participant list: click group header → info panel slides in

active_hours.description: Always-on messenger — peaks in morning commute, lunch break, and evening hours

scroll.description: Chat list: short flick passes (list is compact). Message history: upward pagination — scroll to top to load older messages. Source: WhatsApp Web React rendering behavior

mouse.description: Conversational speed — natural, relaxed cursor movement between chat list and message pane

login.description: QR code scan from WhatsApp mobile app — no password or email flow on web

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate to web.whatsapp.com → wait for QR → scan with phone → wait for session load → click chat in list → wait for messages → read/scroll history → type in composer → send → optionally attach media
